backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages wedding invitation records, supporting create, read, update, RSVP submission, and sample invite seeding operations using a persistent in-memory map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: replacing the filigree SVG overlay with a premium CSS border in FloatingPhotoFrame/BaseTemplate, and adding a WhatsApp sharing button to ShareSection.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, page, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes: landing page (/), invite creator (/create), and invite display (/invite/:id), plus a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepCoup: Form step component for entering bride/groom names, wedding date, tagline, and a read-only default RSVP thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepEven: Form step component for adding, editing, and removing wedding schedule events (name, time, venue, details) with a dynamic list UI.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepGall: A creator step component for uploading and reordering gallery images (with drag-and-drop and upload progress) and adding a background music URL.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepPhot: A creator step component with individual photo uploaders for bride, groom, and cover photos, supporting drag-and-drop, upload progress, and local preview.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepPubl: A creator step that handles final publishing of an invitation, showing per-asset upload progress steps and displaying a share section once the invite is created.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepTemp: A creator step that renders a grid of available invitation templates with light/dark variant toggle and visual selection state.
frontend/src/components/effects/Drifting: A canvas-based animation component that renders drifting petal particles across the full viewport, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/components/effects/Floating: A decorative component that wraps an image in a multi-layered gold-bordered frame with a floating animation and optional accent color.
frontend/src/components/effects/Glassmor: A simple wrapper component that applies a glassmorphism (frosted glass) visual style with optional dark mode variant.
frontend/src/components/effects/MouseTil: A wrapper component that applies a 3D perspective tilt transform based on mouse position, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/effects/Parallax: A wrapper component that translates its children vertically based on scroll position to create a parallax effect, respecting reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Backg: A fixed-position music player button that attempts autoplay on mount and falls back to a first-interaction listener if blocked, with play/pause toggle and a visual hint tooltip.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Count: Displays a live countdown to a wedding date using four flip-style unit cards (days, hours, minutes, seconds), updating every second and showing a celebration message when the date passes.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Event: Renders a vertical alternating timeline of wedding schedule events, each in a glassmorphism card with scroll-triggered fade-in animations, showing time, venue, and optional map links.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Invit: A side-effect-only component that dynamically sets Open Graph and Twitter meta tags (title, description, image) in the document head based on the invite record.
frontend/src/components/invitation/RSVPF: A validated RSVP form with fields for name, phone, email, attendance, guest count, meal preference, and message, triggering a confetti animation on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Share: Displays a QR code and URL copy button for the invitation link, plus a WhatsApp share button that generates a pre-formatted message with couple names and wedding date.
frontend/src/components/landing/SampleIn: A clickable card component that shows a template thumbnail, couple names, and wedding date, navigating to the invite preview page on click with a hover overlay.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout wrapper with a sticky header (logo + 'Create Invitation' nav button) and a footer with branding and attribution.
frontend/src/components/templates/BaseTe: Shared base template component that renders the full invitation page including hero, countdown, events timeline, RSVP form, gallery, music, and share section, accepting style/color props for theming.
frontend/src/components/templates/DarkCo: Wedding invitation template with a deep space/cosmic aesthetic using dark navy/black backgrounds, gold and purple accents, and a starfield SVG pattern.
frontend/src/components/templates/Floral: Wedding invitation template styled with warm marigold and orange floral gradients, supporting both light and dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/Minima: Minimalist wedding invitation template using a cream/parchment palette with subtle gold radial accents, supporting light and dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/RoyalR: Wedding invitation template with a royal Rajasthani style using deep crimson/maroon gradients and gold geometric tile patterns, supporting light and dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/SouthI: Wedding invitation template with a South Indian bronze aesthetic using warm brown and copper tones, supporting light and dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/Sunset: Wedding invitation template with a sunset beach theme using orange, yellow, and peach gradients, supporting light and dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/Temple: Wedding invitation template inspired by temple mandala art using deep burnt orange and brown tones, supporting light and dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/ThreeD: Wedding invitation template with a mystical 3D floating divine aesthetic using deep purple/indigo backgrounds with gold and lavender accents, always rendered in dark mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for listing sample invites, fetching a single invite, creating/updating invites, and submitting RSVPs via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Custom hook that reads and persists a reduced-motion preference from localStorage and syncs with the OS `prefers-reduced-motion` media query, toggling a CSS class on the root element.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines a Hindu wedding OKLCH color palette as CSS variables, and provides utility classes for fonts, glass effects, and themed text colors.
frontend/src/lib/templateRegistry.ts: Defines the list of available wedding invitation templates with metadata and lazily imports their React components, exporting both the template metadata array and a component map keyed by template ID.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module providing class merging (cn), random ID generation, date/datetime formatting for en-IN locale, and a File-to-Base64 data URL converter.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitePage.tsx: Multi-step invitation creation page managing form state across six steps (template, couple details, photos, events, gallery, publish) with per-step validation and payload construction.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Displays a single wedding invitation by fetching it via ID, rendering the appropriate lazily-loaded template component, and showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page featuring a hero section, how-it-works steps, and a grid of sample invite cards loaded from the backend, with animated petal effects and navigation to the creation flow.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (Hindu wedding palette: gold, saffron, marigold, etc.), fonts (Cormorant, Playfair, Cinzel, etc.), shadows, animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate) with dark mode support.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 11) describing the Hindu Wedding Invitation Website Builder app, including its architecture, 8 templates, feature list, known issues (IC 2MB payload limit, music autoplay, performance, photo frame overlap), and fix requests.
